channel.title: Emergency Fund on Sakthi Priyan H
channel.description: Recent content in Emergency Fund on Sakthi Priyan H

item.title: Building Your Emergency Fund
item.description:
Why You Need an Emergency Fund

Before you start investing aggressively, you need a financial cushion. An emergency fund is money set aside for unexpected expenses like:

  • Job loss
  • Medical emergencies
  • Home or car repairs
  • Family emergencies

How Much Do You Need?

The standard recommendation is 6 months of expenses. However, this can vary based on:

  • Job stability
  • Number of dependents
  • Income variability
  • Health conditions
  • Other sources of income

Conservative Approach (9-12 months)

If you:

item.title: Emergency Fund Setup | Using Liquid/Hybrid/Arbitrage Mutual Funds
item.description: Learn how to set up your emergency fund using a mix of Liquid and Hybrid Mutual Funds for both liquidity and steady growth.

item.title: Emergency Fund Setup
item.description: Setup emergency fund using liquid/hybrid Mutual funds

item.title: Emergency Fund Calculator
item.description: Plan your emergency fund and calculate the timeline to reach your savings goal.
